_comment: Central cluster configuration — single source of truth for hosts/ports + the self-update source. Edit here, not in code. No secrets: self-update pulls from the PUBLIC GitHub repo's raw endpoint (update_repo/update_branch), which needs no token.
_discovery: controller_host "auto" finds the controller by UDP broadcast (discovery_port, default 50099), retrying until one answers — no edit needed when the controller moves. Put a static IP here (or pass --controller) only for something broadcast can't cross (subnets/VLANs/VPN); an unreachable static IP also falls back to discovery.
